'''Udrane Galactic Electronics''' was a company that specialized in tool manufacturing. They produced the [[Universal Power Adaptor]]<ref name="GFT" /> and the [[ReliaCharger power calibrator]].<ref name="EGWT" />

{{Company-stub}}
